title: The Man Who Vanished With $200,000

segments.text: In 1971, a man calling himself D.B. Cooper hijacked a passenger plane.
He demanded two hundred thousand dollars and four parachutes.
After releasing the passengers, he got his money.
Then, somewhere over the forests, he jumped from the plane.
He was never found, and the case remains unsolved to this day.
A man who vanished into the night, and into legend.
Follow for cases the world never forgot.

description: In 1971 D.B. Cooper hijacked a plane, jumped out with the ransom, and was never found. Follow for daily cold cases!

title: The Biggest Art Heist in History

segments.text: In 1990, two men dressed as police knocked on a Boston museum door.
The guards let them in, and were quickly tied up.
Over 81 minutes, the thieves took thirteen works of art.
Including paintings by Rembrandt and Vermeer.
The art, worth around 500 million dollars, was never found.
To this day, the empty frames still hang where they were stolen.
Follow for cases the world never forgot.

description: In 1990 thieves dressed as police stole $500M of art from a Boston museum, never found. Follow for daily cold cases!

title: The Heist of the Century

segments.text: In 2003, thieves broke into one of the most secure vaults on Earth.
It sat under the Antwerp Diamond Center, behind layers of security.
Heat sensors, motion detectors, a magnetic lock, and more.
Yet the thieves bypassed every one of them.
They escaped with over one hundred million dollars in diamonds and gold.
Most of the treasure was never recovered.
Follow for cases the world never forgot.

description: In 2003 thieves beat layers of security to steal $100M+ in diamonds in Antwerp. Follow for daily cold cases!

title: The Pensioners Who Pulled Off a Massive Heist

segments.text: In 2015, a gang broke into a London vault over the Easter weekend.
They drilled through a thick concrete wall to reach it.
Inside, they emptied dozens of safe deposit boxes.
They took an estimated fourteen million pounds in jewels and cash.
The twist? Most of the gang were pensioners in their sixties and seventies.
A vault, cracked open by a crew of old-timers.
Follow for cases the world never forgot.

description: In 2015 a gang of pensioners drilled into a London vault and stole 14 million in jewels. Follow for daily cold cases!

title: The Mystery of The Lost Gold Train

segments.text: In 1945, a train carrying treasure disappeared without a trace.
It was loaded with gold, silver, and priceless artifacts.
Rumors spread about buried treasure in the mountains.
Many have searched, but none found the lost train.
Decades later, the train's fate remains a mystery.
A treasure hunt that continues to captivate imaginations.
Follow for cases the world never forgot.

description: In 1945, a train loaded with treasure vanished, leaving a legacy of mystery. Follow for daily cold cases!

title: The Disappearance of the Sodder Children

segments.text: On Christmas Eve 1945, a fire consumed the Sodder home.
Five of the ten children vanished without a trace.
The family believed they were kidnapped, not dead.
Sightings and clues surfaced, but none were ever confirmed.
Years later, the search for the children continues.
A case shrouded in pain and unanswered questions.
Follow for cases the world never forgot.

description: Five children vanished after a house fire in 1945, leading to endless questions. Follow for daily cold cases!

title: The Great Brink's Job

segments.text: In 1956, robbers executed the largest cash heist in history.
They took over $1.5 million from a secure vault.
The planning was meticulous, but the aftermath was chaotic.
Many were arrested, yet a significant amount of cash vanished.
The case remains partially unsolved, with theories abounding.
A heist that changed the face of robbery forever.
Follow for cases the world never forgot.

description: In 1956, the Brink's heist shocked the world, yet some questions remain. Follow for daily cold cases!

title: The Vanished Ship of the Great Lakes

segments.text: In 1920, a vessel mysteriously disappeared on Lake Michigan.
The ship was carrying a full crew and cargo.
Search efforts found no trace of the vessel.
Theories emerged about storms and sabotage.
Decades have passed, but the ship's fate remains unknown.
A maritime mystery that still haunts the shores.
Follow for cases the world never forgot.

description: A ship vanished on Lake Michigan in 1920, and its mystery endures. Follow for daily cold cases!

title: The Unsolved Murder of Elizabeth Short

segments.text: In 1947, Elizabeth Short was found dead in Los Angeles.
Her brutal murder shocked the nation and remains unsolved.
Known as the Black Dahlia, she became a symbol of mystery.
Countless suspects and theories emerged, yet no convictions.
The case continues to intrigue true crime enthusiasts.
A tragic story that haunts the streets of L.A.
Follow for cases the world never forgot.

description: Elizabeth Short's unsolved murder in 1947 captivated the public and still resonates. Follow for daily cold cases!
